candidate_problem_record.subject: Chemistry
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Four different acid solutions of $0.0100 \, M$ are prepared, and their $pH$ values are recorded on a laptop computer. One of the solutions contains more than just an acid. At the point designated as ``add,'' all four solutions are diluted with an equal volume of water. The bottom line represents solution 1, and the top line represents solution 4. Which acid(s) will require the most $0.0050 \, M \, NaOH$ to neutralize $25.0 \, mL$ of a $0.010 \, M$ solution of the acid?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: They will all require the same volume of $NaOH$.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh:
准备了四种不同的 $0.0100 \, \mathrm{mol/L}$ 酸溶液,并记录了它们的 $\mathrm{pH}$ 值。其中一种溶液不仅含有酸。在标记为"添加"的点,所有四种溶液均用相等体积的水进行了稀释。底线代表溶液1,顶线代表溶液4。若要中和 $25.0 \, \mathrm{mL}$ 的 $0.010 \, \mathrm{mol/L}$ 酸溶液,哪种酸需要最多的 $0.0050 \, \mathrm{mol/L} \, \mathrm{NaOH}$?

A. 溶液1
B. 溶液2
C. 溶液3
D. 它们需要相同体积的 $\mathrm{NaOH}$。
metadata.explanation_zh: 在滴定过程中,酸溶液1、2和3到达当量点所需的碱量是相同的。这是因为中和酸溶液所需的碱量仅取决于酸溶液的初始浓度和体积,而与酸的种类或强度无关。当加入的碱物质的量与溶液中最初存在的酸物质的量相等时,就达到了当量点。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The prompt is complete and the graph is legible enough to show four pH traces before and after dilution at the marked 'Add' point. A reviewer can understand the intended chemistry comparison, and the expected answer is coherent.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
